## How to test
Steps to verify this works:

1. `git clone` / pull this branch
2. `npm install && node server.js`
3. Open `http://localhost:8080`
4. Do '...'

## Checklist
- [ ] Tested in demo mode (no API keys)
- [ ] Tested with at least one live AI provider (if AI-related change)
- [ ] No new JavaScript errors in browser console
- [ ] Server starts cleanly with no new warnings
- [ ] Soul files / MEMORY.md updated if NPC personality changed
